我站这儿就好了 I'm fine right here.
各位 还有两分钟 Two minutes, people.
他们把我从车里拖出来 So they pull me from the car.
俩腿都断了 颅骨撞裂了 Both legs broken, fractured skull,
肺也刺穿了 punctured lung.
心脏停止跳动 整整两分钟 My heart stops. Two full minutes.
医生人工起搏 没反应 They're pumping my chest. Nothing.
又用了除纤颤器 ? They grab the defibrillators. Pachoom!
还是没反应 Nothing.
到第三次 心脏才开始跳动 Third time, the pistons start firing.
医生们说我能活下来是个奇迹 Doctors tell me it's a miracle I'm alive.
但要知道 这是上帝敲的警钟 But, seriously, you talk about a wake-up call from God.
死里逃生这种事不会有第二次 You don't get to come back from the dead twice.
美利坚合众国总统 The President of the United States.
早上好 Good morning.
由我签署并于今天生效的 "The education reform and achievement act
《教育改革和成就法案》 that I sign into law today
与全国的孩子及家长息息相关 will affect every child and parent in the United States,
它将改善未来数十年的教学水平 will ensure a better educated workforce for decades to come,
巩固并强化美国 and will reinforce America's
作为教育强国的领先地位 preeminence as an intellectual superpower.
在此我要特别感谢一个人 And I'd like to thank one man in particular
他富有远见卓识 who never lost sight of the larger mission,
并带领完成了这部法案 who spearheaded this bill from the beginning,
他就是弗兰克·安德伍德议员 and that's congressman Frank Underwood."
各位贵宾 东厅备有点心 请随我们来 Invited guests, please join us in the east room for refreshments.
媒体朋友们 Media, we will
我们马上将在简报室集中开会 convene immediately in the briefing room for our conference.
谢谢你 琳达 法案能够顺利通过 Linda, thank you so much for all the help you gave us
你功不可没啊 in getting this bill passed.
不 谢谢你 弗兰克 No, thank you, Frank.
这完全是你的心血 This was your baby from the beginning.
幸好你能坚持己见 弗兰克 I appreciate you standing your ground on this one, Frank.
我还知道有错就该承认 I'm smart enough to admit when I was wrong.
我刚才还跟弗兰克说该每周碰次面 I was just telling Frank we should set up a weekly
让他向我们汇报众议院那边的动态 so he can keep us up to date on what's going on in the house.
听上去是个好主意 That sounds like a great idea.
恭喜 先生 Congratulations, sir.
加勒特 我们能谈一下吗 Garrett, I was wondering if we could talk for a few minutes.
几周前我对你提起的那件事 That thing I mentioned a couple of weeks ago
有关就业税收抵免 about the jobs tax credit...
我想了很多 吉姆 I've been giving it a lot of thought, Jim,
觉得这主意不错 and I think it's a good idea.
不介意的话我想去翻翻备忘录 But I'd like to look over my notes first, if you don't mind,
这样就能和你自如探讨了 so I can talk about it intelligently with you.
先生 首相来电 Sir, you have your call with the Prime Minister.
大忙人 Busy man.
没错 Yes, he is.
弗兰克 听说你打算 Frank, I hear that you are heading up
去我家乡参与一场补选 the special election in my home state.
彼得·罗素 在正式声明前 Peter Russo. We're trying to keep that
我们打算低调行事 under the radar until he officially announces.
事实上 在那之前 In fact, we're not even working
我们都不在我办公室办公 out of my office until that happens.
那在哪呢 我家地下室 Where are you working from? The basement of my house.
民主党全国委员会 Any reason why the D.N.C.
怎么不就候选人征询我呢 didn't ask my advice on the candidate?
我以为他们或琳达获得了你的首肯 Well, I thought they passed it by you, or Linda did.
但他们没有 这真是无法接受 Nobody did. Well, that is unacceptable.
而且我对罗素持怀疑态度 And I have major doubts about Russo.
经验不足吗 对 他立足于城市 His inexperience? Yes, and he's urban-based.
不知道他能不能和农村选民打交道 I don't know if he'll connect with rural voters.
老实说 这也是我的顾虑之一 Look, frankly, that's one of my concerns as well.
我们正在想办法 We're working on that.
但如果你能跟他一起做竞选宣传 But if you were to come out and stump with him,
那对他将极为有利 that would go a long way to convince...
弗兰克 我不能为我不信任的人作宣传 Frank, I can't stump for somebody I don't believe in.
现在还早 希望你别急着下定论 It's early days yet. I'd ask you to keep an open mind.
如果想让我 And let me know if you want me
安排你们见面尽管说 to set up a meeting between the two of you,
因为你的支持 先生 because, sir, an endorsement from you
对他是莫大的帮助 would be a big coup for him.
见到你真好 副总统先生 It's good to see you, Mr. Vice President.
弗兰克 Frank.
安德伍德议员 Congressman Underwood?
巴恩斯小姐 我怎么记得 Miss Barnes, I was under the impression
你不想来做白宫记者 you didn't wanna cover the White House.
头条网昨天才拿到许可 Slugline just got access yesterday.
我听说了 我离开《先驱报》 I know. I left the Herald
正是因为不愿来白宫 because I didn't wanna cover the White House,
现在我还是来了 and now here I am.
许可和镣铐还是有点区别的 Access isn't the same as a ball and chain.
我只有在签法案时才能见到你咯 Am I only gonna see you at bill signings now?
我已经三周没有你的消息了 I haven't heard from you in three weeks.
没有安全感很无聊 Insecurity bores me.
居高临下也让我觉得无聊 I feel the same way about condescension.
今晚你家见 Your place, this evening,
来之前我会给你短信 and I'll text you when I'm about to arrive.
要是我到时候在忙呢 What if I'm busy?
你只是怕再被放鸽子 You're just afraid I'm gonna stand you up again.
我只想确定这值得我等 I just wanna make sure it's worth my while.
会值得的 It'll be worth your while.
这是对上次的补偿 This'll make up for last time.
历史的见证物 It's a piece of history.
从总统手里传到了你这儿 From the President's hand to yours.
你相信他们刚刚说的上帝什么的吗 You believe in all that higher-power stuff they talk about in the room?
我相信总有事情是我们无法掌控的 I believe there are things beyond our control.
至于谁掌控着这些事 我不知道 Who or what's controlling them... that I don't know.
我不相信上帝 I don't believe in God.
天堂 地狱 什么都不信 Heaven, hell. None of it.
天主教会学校上多了 或许吧 Too much catholic school? Maybe.
彼得 我不是说你非得信上帝 I'm not saying you have to believe in God, Peter,
或者其它任何事 or anything, for that matter.
但也别急着否定一切 But you shouldn't rule anything out.
我要走了 I should go.
帐记在竞选经费上 It's on the campaign.
道格·斯坦普 收
我还需要钱 别塞嘴里
民调数据显示81%可能投票的选民 Our crosstabs show 81% of likely voters
会考虑投给戒酒的候选人 are willing to consider a recovering alcoholic.
如果换成可卡因的话这个数字会下降 Now, those numbers dip a little when you introduce cocaine,
但不会下降很多 but not by much.
兰迪 Randy?
有风险 不过轰动是肯定的 It's a risk, but it'll make waves.
免费得到主流媒体的关注和报道 Free coverage across the board.
竞选主题得是救赎 The narrative has to be redemption.
凤凰从灰烬中涅盘 A Phoenix from the ashes.
就别提灰烬了 Well, let's not focus on the ashes.
别让大家觉得彼得过去一团乱 We don't want people to think Peter was a disaster.
不 我们侧重积极的一面 No, no. We focus on the positive.
"崭新"或"干净"的开始 A "Fresh start" And a "Clean start"
焦点小组对这两个词都很喜欢 both did well in focus groups.
"干净的开始"听着像是洗白的 "Clean start" sounds too much like "Clean slate."
我喜欢"崭新的开始" 我也是 I like "Fresh start." Yeah, I do too.
筹款怎么样了 How we doing on the fund-raising?
酗酒史会使他失去一些州内捐款 The alcoholic thing will turn off some of the in-state donors,
但这不是大型选举 but it's an off-year election.
我们可以去纽约和加州找找老金主 We can hit up the usual suspects in New York and California.
沃尔特 我们有多少弱点 Walter, how vulnerable are we?
这还难说 I'm not prepared to answer that question.
彼得还没向我忏悔呢 Peter and I have yet to perform the holy sacrament of confession.
关闭造船厂一事我们也得有所表示 We still need to address the shipyard closing too.
这方面克莱尔在处理 Claire's helping us with that.
我们在推动一项 We are pushing a bill
《特拉华河流域法案》 called the Delaware river watershed Act,
预计将在三年内 and I think it's going to bring about
为彼得的选区带来约五千个岗位 5,000 jobs into Peter's district over the next three years.
我们已经完成了一份草案 We have a draft of the bill completed.
彼得正在找法案的联署者 Peter's in the process of securing cosponsors.
对了 你都问过谁了 And who have you called, by the way?
我发了几份邮件 I have some e-mails out,
大多数想先看看法案 but most of them wanna see a bill first.
船厂那边你约过谁见面了吗 Have you set up a meeting with the shipbuilders yet?
我不认为他们会支持我 I don't think they're gonna back me.
法案就是为了他们啊 彼得 That's the entire point of the bill, Peter.
如果我去跟他们说 Well, if I go to them and I say,
你们有些人可能会重新找到工作 "Hey, some of you maybe will get your jobs back,
不过不是明天 而是三年后 "Not tomorrow, but three years from now,
大多数还得继续失业在家 and most of you won't be getting your jobs back anyway... "
好吧 先找联署人 这事暂且放一边 All right, let's put a pin in this until we get more sponsors.
我要回趟办公室 晚点再过来 I have to go to the office. I'll catch you all later.
好了 说一下竞选方案吧 Okay, let's move on to our field plan.
要逐个区讨论… I want to go through the regions one by one...
弗兰西斯 Francis.
我们在这个法案上花了六周时间 We spent six weeks on that bill.
不会有问题 他会想明白的 It'll be fine. He'll come around.
那晚上见 I'll see you later tonight?
我有约了 I have an appointment.
那我明天早上才能见到你了 So I won't see you until morning.
我会在你起床前回来 I'll be back before you get up.
感谢你今天能抽出时间过来 先生 I appreciate your taking the time today, sir.
经济研究小组起草的 Did you get that tax credit memo

你叫我来不是为了讨论备忘录吧 You didn't ask me here to talk about memos.
有话直说吧 琳达 I know small talk when I hear it, Linda.

不要过分插手宾州的事务 that you take a step back from Pennsylvania.
你最近经常去那儿 You've been taking a lot of trips there,
与立法者会面… meeting with legislators...
那是我的家乡 而且正面临着就业危机 It's my home state. There's a jobs crisis.
我们不能偏帮单个州 We can't afford to play favorites.
我们的方针是五十个州 一套解决方案 The message is 50 states, one solution;
而不是一个州 五十套方案 not one state, 50 solutions.
我并没指望能参与每一项政策和决策的制定 I never expected to be involved in every policy or decision,
但我现在是什么事都被蒙在鼓里 but I have been completely cut out of everything.
我们很重视你的意见 副总统先生 We value your input, Mr. Vice President,
但现在我们不能… but right now, we can't...
别一副高高在上的口气 琳达 Don't condescend, Linda.
甚至都没人问我希望由谁来接替州长一职 No one even asked me who I thought should fill my seat.
为什么这事是弗兰克·安德伍德牵头而不是我 Why is Frank Underwood leading the charge on that, not me?
那是民主党全国委员会的决定 That is a D.N.C. issue.
我们不会插手 你也一样 We are staying out of it and so should you.
那我就只能负责剪彩和出席葬礼吗 And so I'm supposed to just cut ribbons and go to funerals?
你应该清楚你的职责范围 You knew what you signed up for.
谢谢你 副总统先生 Thank you, Mr. Vice President.
我没拿到我的钢笔 I didn't get my pen.
你的钢笔 签署法案的笔 Your pen? From the bill signing.
我们会想办法解决的 Oh, we'll see what we can do about that.
我看到你的保镖了 I can see your security guy.
密查姆吗 Meechum?
他可真帅 He's cute.
他不会喜欢你的 He'd never go for you.
为什么 Why not?
你令他生畏 You're too intimidating.
可他有枪啊 He's the one with the gun.
但你有议员 But you're the one with the congressman.
我们做完再谈 We'll talk after.
我们谈完再做 We'll talk before.
彼得·罗素 Peter Russo.
宾州第一选区的议员 Pennsylvania's first district.
他会竞选州长 He's gonna run for governor.
接替马修斯的职位 Fill Matthews' seat.
这会是一篇独家专访 It's an exclusive profile.
但对象是个无名小卒 With someone no one's ever heard of.
报道角度呢 What's the angle?
酗酒 吸毒 Alcohol, drugs.
他是个出身贫寒的野孩子 He's a kid from the streets.
我希望专访能在他宣布参选后马上发布 I want the profile to come out as soon as he announces,
并且向着他说话 and I'd like it to be kind.
我不写吹捧报道 I don't write puff pieces.
那就找别人写 Then get someone else to write it.
我以为你有料给我 I thought you had something for me.
人们很容易就会猜到我是你的消息来源 It's too easy for people to link me as your source.
那就危险了 It's dangerous.
把头条让给别人 我得不到好处啊 I don't benefit from handing out headlines to other people.
别低估了慷慨的力量 佐伊 Generosity is its own form of power, Zoe.

第七步 Step seven.
你总是大晚上戴墨镜吗 You always wear sunglasses at night?
你怎么找到我的 How did you find me?
我猜你肯定是公务员 I figured you had to be in government.
就在网上搜索 终于找到你的照片 I kept googling till I found your picture.
这招没用的 This won't work, what you're doing.
那次是一锤子买卖 It was a one-time deal.
你不能一直要挟我 You don't get to keep coming back for more.
我会去报警 I'll go to the police.
他们只会当面嘲笑你 瞧你这样子 They'll laugh in your face. Look at you.
如果警察不信我 If the police won't listen to me,
我就爆料给电视台 I'll call TV stations.
我知道你们是谁 I know the names...
道格拉斯·斯坦普 彼得·罗素 Douglas Stamper, Peter Russo,
弗兰克·安德伍德 Frank Underwood.
你现在走的是条危险的路 You are walking down a road you do not want to walk down.
求你了 我不会说出去的 Please, I won't call anyone.
但我需要你的帮助 But I need your help.
我无处可去 没有人可以联系 I don't have anywhere to go. I don't have anyone I can call.
我不再想做我现在做的一些事了 I've had to do things. And I don't wanna do it anymore.
现在我身上就这么多 That's all I've got right now.
找个住处 告诉我地址 Find a place to stay and let me know where you are.
我会再想办法的 I'll figure something out.
饿吗 You hungry?
你叫什么名字 What's your name?
蓝宝石 Sapphire.
不是这个名字 本名 No. What's your name?
瑞秋 Rachel.
你前妻做过什么不体面的事吗 Your ex-wife... anything uncouth?
什么意思 How do you mean?
性虐待 群交 掺尿纵欲 Bondage, orgies, water sports?
没有 绝对没有 吸食毒品吗 No. Definitely not. Narcotics?
她不好这口 大麻都不来点 She wasn't into that. Not even a little ganga?
好吧 心情低落时抽过 Okay. Once in a blue moon.
跟孩子一起抽过吗 Ever with your children?
天呐 怎么可能 在孩子面前抽过吗 God, no! Ever in front of them?
听着 我不是个绝世好爸 Look, I'm not the world's best dad,
但我绝不会做那种事 but I would never do that.
好的 我们来谈谈招妓问题吧 Fine. Let's move on to prostitution.
还要问多久 How long is this gonna take?
直到我完全了解你为止 Until there's nothing I don't know about you.
我全都写下来了 I wrote all this down.
我做这行很久了 议员先生 I've been doing this a long time, congressman.
我知道什么时候才算完 I know when I've scraped all the shit off the shoe.
招妓问题 Prostitution.
离婚后 我去了趟泰国旅行 After my divorce, I took a trip to Thailand.
大概待了两周 It was about two weeks.
找了多少女人 How many women?
10人 15人 Ten. Fifteen.
我不确定 记忆有些模糊了 I... I don't know. It was a bit of a blur.
沾毒品了没 There were drugs?
沾了 Uh, yes.
鸦片 安非他明[兴奋剂] Opium, speed,
海洛因都用了 some smack.
吸粉还是注射 都来 Powder or needles? Both.
她们知道你是谁吗 Would any of these women know who you are?
没有 她们都不说英语 No. None of them spoke English.
我也从未提过自己是议员 And I never mentioned I was a congressman.
你在国内注射过海洛因吗 Have you mainlined heroin back here in the States?
就一次 胳膊上有疤痕吗 Just once. Any scars on your arm?
没有 我主要吸食可卡因 No. I was mainly into cocaine.
在特区招妓呢 What about prostitutes here in D.C.?
多久一次 How often?
我有时会乱搞 行了吧 请说详细点 I fucked around a bit, okay? Details, please.
这种事让你很来劲吗 Do you get off on this or something?
医生托着你的蛋让你咳嗽时 Does a doctor enjoy it when he cups your balls
他享不享受呢 and asks you to cough?
你想知道我来过几次高潮吗 You wanna know how many times I came?
我根本不在乎你能否当选 I honestly don't care whether you win.
但你想当选 就得跟我合作 But if you do, work with me.
你在特区多久招一回妓 How often did you solicit prostitutes in D.C.?
两到三个月一次 Once every two or three months.
有时频繁些 有时会少些 Sometimes more frequently, sometimes less.
你有理由相信她们中有人未成年吗 Do you have reason to believe any of them were underage?
天呐 没有 大多是高端妓女 Jesus! No. Look, they were mostly high-end.
那不代表她们都到18岁了 That doesn't mean they were 18.
我得休息一下 I need a fucking break!
怎么了 What's going on?
他道行太浅 弗兰克 He's an amateur, Frank.
如果我不到一小时就激怒了他 If I can get under his skin in less than an hour,
面对媒体攻击他能撑多久呢 how do you think he'll hold up under the press?
会被人当活靶子打 It'll be a Turkey shoot.
知道了 我会跟他谈的 All right. I'll speak to him.
弗兰克 这…不行 Frank, it's just... it's not gonna work.
我会被折磨死的 I'm gonna get crucified.
没事的 我们有最好的团队帮你 You'll be fine. We've got a crack team behind you.
不是说团队好就行了 It doesn't matter how good the team is.
像我这样的过去 算了吧 I mean with my past? Come on.
我一开始就把方案告诉你了 From the very beginning, I said this was the plan.
你也同意的 当时我没考虑清楚 You agreed to it. I didn't think it through.
我们必须直面这些问题 We have to tackle this head-on,
否则共和党就真要整死你了 or the G.O.P. will crucify you.
我们需要借力打力 We have to steal their ammunition from them.
坦诚是你最佳防御也是最佳攻击 Honesty is your best defense and offense.
要上镜头说这些话的人是我 I'm the one that has to get in front of these cameras and say this shit.
他们又不用说 是我 They don't have to say it. I do.
彼得… 我想成为州长 真的 Peter... I wanna be governor. I do.
但不能以这种方式 我做不来 But not this way. I just can't do it.
如果你现在没打退堂鼓 If you weren't unsure now,
那才叫有毛病呢 there'd be something wrong with you.
这是预料之中 I expected this.
我们要你做的事并不容易 Not easy... what we're asking you to do.
犹豫是正常的 It's okay to vacillate a little.
我不是想妨碍你们 I'm not trying to throw a wrench in the works.
这我知道 跟你说 I know you're not. I'll tell you what.
